hooks.command: if [ "${METADEV:-}" != "1" ]; then echo '❌ FATAL: Claude must be launched via metadev (safehouse sandbox). Run ./metadev instead of claude directly.' >&2; exit 2; fi

SESSION_DIR=~/.claude/projects/$(pwd | tr '/.' '--'); ACTIVE_SID=$(ls -t "$SESSION_DIR"/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs basename 2>/dev/null | sed 's/\.jsonl$//'); echo "${ACTIVE_SID:-unknown}" > /tmp/metadev-session-${METADEV_CORRELATION_ID:-none}
if [ "${METADEV:-}" != "1" ]; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Claude must be launched via metadev (safehouse sandbox). Run ./metadev instead of claude directly.' >&2; kill $PPID; exit 2; fi
